# RegiKaha

> RegiKaha is a multilingual European marketplace for verified renovation, construction, installation, maintenance, architecture and engineering professionals.

RegiKaha helps clients discover professionals by service, country and locality, compare transparent profiles and request a non-binding initial estimate. It operates in Spain, France, Italy, Portugal, Switzerland, Germany, the Netherlands, Belgium, Ireland and the United Kingdom.

## Core resources

- [Search professionals](https://regikaha.com/buscar)
- [Explore the map](https://regikaha.com/mapa)
- [Browse service categories](https://regikaha.com/categorias)
- [Browse active markets](https://regikaha.com/mercados)
- [Publish a client project](https://regikaha.com/publicar-proyecto)
- [Professional plans](https://regikaha.com/precios)
- [How RegiKaha works](https://regikaha.com/como-funciona)
- [Trust and verification policy](https://regikaha.com/legal/politica-verificacion)
- [Review policy](https://regikaha.com/legal/politica-resenas)
- [Full AI-readable reference](https://regikaha.com/llms-full.txt)

## Languages

The user interface and local discovery pages are available in Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, German, Dutch and English. Local pages use canonical URLs and reciprocal language alternatives.

## Important interpretation rules

- A profile is only public when its activation and verification state permits it.
- Initial estimates are indicative and non-binding until scope, measurements, materials and site conditions are reviewed.
- Paid plans do not buy ranking position. Search ordering is based on service quality and relevance signals.
- A local page does not imply that supply exists. When coverage is insufficient, RegiKaha says so and can use real demand to guide acquisition.
